pages.text: $(o)"Each thing in its place; each place its name; each name its order — and the world is composed."$()$(br2)Core creed of the Ordering School. One scroll, and chaos in the bag is undone.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: On the $(l)caster$()'s main inventory (slots 0–35):$(br)· Merge identical items into full stacks$(br)· Sort by item ID alphabetically$(br)· Armor / offhand / curio slots untouched$(br2)Cost: $(l)1600$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Pure quality-of-life — but the post-expedition tidy is irreplaceable.$(br2)Cheap; carry one always.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 1 Dormant$() works.
